question: Hantavirus pandemic in 2026 or Starmer out before July 2026? [Polymarket]
reason: No evidence of a Hantavirus pandemic in 2026; Keir Starmer remains Prime Minister.
evidence: No widespread Hantavirus pandemic reported in 2026.
Keir Starmer has not resigned as Prime Minister.
Internal party pressures on Starmer have not led to his resignation.
Starmer has publicly stated he will not set a resignation timetable.
No significant political events indicating Starmer's imminent departure.
